summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: PATCH /api/admin/categories/{id} slug conflict (409) false-positive issue is FIXED. When editing category without changing slug, API now returns 200 (not 409). Duplicate slug protection still works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slug conflict fix verified. Backend correctly skips duplicate check when slug is unchanged.

verification_summary.bug_description: PATCH /api/admin/categories/{id} returning 409 slug conflict when editing category without changing slug
verification_summary.root_cause: Backend was checking slug uniqueness even when slug value was unchanged
verification_summary.fix_logic: Now only runs duplicate slug query if payload.slug != current_slug

test_2_duplicate_slug_conflict.description: PATCH with slug belonging to another category

test_3_frontend_edit_flow.description: /admin/categories edit modal save without slug change
